title: Richer dev-env chat: model + effort switchers, light/dark/system theme, voice (read-aloud + talk)

buildWebChannel.note: web-channel mounts <ClaudeChat> with no features prop -> toolbar/theme/voice never render; data-theme never set -> original dark look preserved. Provably unaffected.

emojiScan.note: no emoji codepoints in any agent-touched UI file (user rule)

visual.note: rendered ClaudeChat standalone (stub transport) with all features on. Toolbar text verified: 'Model Opus/Sonnet/Haiku · Effort Normal/Think/Think hard/Ultrathink · Compact · Copy last · Read aloud'. data-theme flips dark(default)->light. Fixed a light-mode specificity bug where the active chip accent was washed out (added light-scoped .cc-chip-active/.cc-mode-active overrides).

mechanisms.model: selecting a chip submits `/model <id>` into the live Claude PTY via transport.sendCommand (no transcript turn); status line reflects the active model
mechanisms.effort: the chosen directive (think / think hard / ultrathink) is prepended to the wire text of the next message only; Normal = nothing; persisted in localStorage
mechanisms.theme: chat shares the terminal's localStorage key (garrison.devenv.termTheme) + a window CustomEvent so both re-theme in lockstep; default dark keeps web-channel unchanged
mechanisms.voice: dev-env server proxies /voice/{health,tts,stt} to the deepgram-voice fitting (discovered from ~/.garrison/ui-fittings/deepgram-voice.json); UI gates voice controls on /voice/health and disables them gracefully on 503

knownLimits: voice controls require the deepgram-voice fitting running + DEEPGRAM_API_KEY set; degrade to disabled otherwise (verified down-path)
live microphone (MediaRecorder/getUserMedia) not exercised in a real browser; the STT forward path was verified with synthetic audio through the proxy
the rich toolbar was verified via a standalone render harness, not an in-session dev-env screenshot (the dev-env chat needs a live Claude PTY session)
